CLIENT_ID_REQUIRED: The client ID is mandatory to create an order.
EQUIPMENT_TYPE_REQUIRED: The equipment type (Laptop, PC, etc.) is required.
ORDER_ID_REQUIRED_FOR_UPDATE: An Order ID is required to perform an update.
CANNOT_UPDATE_ITEM_WITHOUT_ID: Cannot update an item that doesn't have a valid ID.
CLIENT_NOT_FOUND: The requested client does not exist.
ITEM_NOT_FOUND: The inventory item was not found.
ORDER_NOT_FOUND: The repair order was not found.
ORDER_PART_NOT_FOUND: The specified part is not linked to this order.
INVALID_EMAIL: The email format is not valid.
STOCK_CANNOT_BE_NEGATIVE: Inventory stock cannot be less than zero.
PRICE_CANNOT_BE_NEGATIVE: The price cannot be a negative value.
QUANTITY_MUST_BE_GREATER_THAN_ZERO: The quantity must be at least 1.
INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Insufficient stock for SKU {sku}. Requested: {requested}, Available: {current}
INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION: The requested status change is not allowed.
CANNOT_UPDATE_DELIVERED_ORDER: This order is already delivered and cannot be modified.
ORDER_ALREADY_DELIVERED: This order has already been handed over to the client.
DATABASE_ERROR: A technical error occurred while saving the data.
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support.
